{"cards": [{"name": "Arcane Revelation", "mana_cost": "{3}{U}{U}", "cmc": 5, "colors": ["U"], "color_identity": ["U"], "type_line": "Sorcery", "oracle_text": "Choose one —
• Draw three cards.
• Look at the top seven cards of your library. Put two of them into your hand and the rest on the bottom of your library in any order.
• Return target instant or sorcery card from your graveyard to your hand, then draw a card.", "flavor_text": "Knowledge takes many forms, but wisdom chooses the right one.", "power": null, "toughness": null, "loyalty": null, "rarity": "rare", "design_notes": "A modal blue sorcery that offers different types of card selection and advantage. Each mode is appropriately costed for the effect - straight draw, library manipulation, or recursion with a bonus. The modal structure tests proper formatting while staying within blue's color pie of card draw and selection."}, {"name": "Creeping Doom", "mana_cost": "{1}{B}", "cmc": 2, "colors": ["B"], "color_identity": ["B"], "type_line": "Instant", "oracle_text": "Destroy target creature with mana value 3 or less.", "flavor_text": "Death finds the weak first.", "power": null, "toughness": null, "loyalty": null, "rarity": "common", "design_notes": "A simple conditional removal spell appropriate for common. The mana value restriction keeps it balanced while still being useful. Tests straightforward targeting language for destruction effects in black's wheelhouse."}, {"name": "Charnel Harvester", "mana_cost": "{2}{B}{B}", "cmc": 4, "colors": ["B"], "color_identity": ["B"], "type_line": "Creature — Zombie", "oracle_text": "When ~ enters, mill three cards.
Whenever a creature card is put into your graveyard from anywhere, you gain 1 life.", "flavor_text": "It feeds on death itself, growing stronger with each fallen soul.", "power": "3", "toughness": "2", "loyalty": null, "rarity": "uncommon", "design_notes": "An uncommon creature with ETB mill and ongoing graveyard synergy. The life gain trigger works with its own mill and future creature deaths, creating incremental value. Stats are reasonable for the cost with upside abilities. Tests proper trigger wording for multiple sources."}, {"name": "Noxara, Death's Herald", "mana_cost": "{3}{B}{B}{B}", "cmc": 6, "colors": ["B"], "color_identity": ["B"], "type_line": "Legendary Creature — Demon", "oracle_text": "Flying, deathtouch
When ~ enters, destroy target creature. Its controller loses life equal to its mana value.
{2}{B}, Sacrifice a creature: Return target creature card from your graveyard to the battlefield. It gains haste until end of turn.", "flavor_text": null, "power": "5", "toughness": "4", "loyalty": null, "rarity": "mythic", "design_notes": "A mythic legendary demon with multiple powerful abilities. Flying and deathtouch provide immediate threat, ETB removal with life loss is splashy, and the activated ability provides ongoing reanimation. High mana cost justifies the power level. Tests complex legendary design with multiple ability types."}, {"name": "Searing Bolt", "mana_cost": "{1}{R}", "cmc": 2, "colors": ["R"], "color_identity": ["R"], "type_line": "Instant", "oracle_text": "~ deals 3 damage to any target.", "flavor_text": "Lightning doesn't ask permission.", "power": null, "toughness": null, "loyalty": null, "rarity": "common", "design_notes": "A straightforward burn spell at common rarity. 3 damage for 2 mana with flexible targeting (any target) is appropriately costed for the format. Tests the standard damage assignment wording while staying within red's core identity of direct damage."}]}
